title: AI System Manifest
description: Required declaration for every AI system subject to EU AI Act obligations. Commit this file alongside your service code. Evaluated by Conftest at PR time.

id.description: Unique system identifier. Used as primary key in AI inventory.

risk_tier.description: Declared risk tier. Annex III policy will auto-elevate if use_case_domain triggers high-risk.

use_case_domain.description: Primary use case domain. Annex III classification runs on this field.

agent_type.description: none = no agent; assisted = human drives, AI assists; semi_autonomous = AI acts within bounded scope; autonomous = AI acts without per-action approval

deployer.description: Organisation deploying this system. You are a deployer if you use AI built by someone else.

provider.description: Model or system provider (e.g. Anthropic, OpenAI, internal). Optional but recommended.

data_governance.description: Article 10 — Training and input data governance

training_data_documented.description: Article 10(2): Training, validation, testing datasets documented with provenance.

bias_assessment_completed.description: Article 10(2)(f): Dataset examination for possible biases completed.

gdpr_lawful_basis.description: GDPR Article 6 lawful basis for personal data processed by this system.

data_provenance_url.description: Link to data lineage documentation or data card.

personal_data_processed.description: Whether this system processes personal data of EU residents.

special_category_data.description: GDPR Article 9 special category data (health, biometrics, race, etc.).

enabled.description: Article 12(1): Automatic logging of events enabled.

retention_days.description: Article 12(1): Minimum 6 months (180 days) log retention required.

storage_location.description: Where logs are stored. Must be retrievable for regulatory review.

covers_inputs.description: Logs capture input data or references to input data.

covers_outputs.description: Logs capture AI system outputs and decisions.

human_in_loop_threshold.description: Article 14(1): Condition under which a human must review before action is taken. E.g. 'all decisions affecting individuals', 'confidence < 0.8', 'financial impact > £10k'.

override_mechanism.description: Article 14(4)(b): How a human can intervene, override, or halt the system.

responsible_person.description: Article 14(4): Named role or team responsible for human oversight.

review_required_for_high_impact.description: Article 14(5)(a): Individual with authority and competence can review, question, and override automated decisions.

autonomy_scope.description: Explicit description of actions the system may take autonomously without per-action human approval.

ai_disclosure_implemented.description: Article 50(1): Users informed they are interacting with an AI system.

synthetic_content_labelled.description: Article 50(2): AI-generated content labelled as such where applicable.

machine_readable_marking.description: Article 50(2): Synthetic content includes machine-readable watermarking or metadata.

instructions_for_use_documented.description: Article 13(1): Provider has supplied instructions on operation, limitations, and risks.

limitations_documented.description: Article 13(3)(b): System limitations and foreseeable circumstances where performance degrades are documented.

risk_management_documented.description: Article 9(1): Risk management system established, documented, and maintained.

residual_risks_identified.description: Article 9(2)(d): Residual risks evaluated and communicated to deployers.

post_market_monitoring_plan.description: Article 72: Post-market monitoring plan in place for high-risk systems.

incident_reporting_process.description: Article 73: Serious incident reporting process defined.

conformity.description: Article 48/49 — Declaration of conformity and CE marking (high-risk only)

eu_database_registered.description: Article 49: High-risk AI systems must be registered in EU database before go-live.
